text:
Piers Morganhas sparked backlash after he commented about Keely Hodgkinson winning gold at the 800m final. The middle distance runner won Team GB's first gold of theParis Olympics.

After the 22-year old sprinted to victory, Piers took to X to re-share an old tweet he posted in 2021 when Keely won silver during the Tokyo Olympics.

He originally wrote: "I'm sorry that facts make you vomit. Self-evidently, if you don't win a race, you lose it. And Keeley lost to someone the same age as her. But great to see her break the British record and I hope she now works even harder & wins Gold at Paris in 2024."

Following Keely's win, Piers then congratulated her and said: " This aged well. Congrats@keelyhodgkinson- you took my advice and won," with added medal and clapping hands emojis.

Many of his followers have slammed the journalist in the comments section, with many describing him as "shameful" and told him to "stop taking credit for her."

READ MORE:BBC's Jessica Ennis-Hill in tears as she makes heartbreaking family confession



One person said online: "Will you stop claiming credit for every gold medal someone wins in the Olympics!"

A second fan also wrote: "Always making other people's success somehow about you. Shameless attention seeking."

A third person typed: "Love that she won, but sometimes Piers you can be completely moronic." A fourth said: "Your advice? Your ego is out of control."

After her sensational victory, Keely said: "That was absolutely incredible. I’ve worked so hard over the last year and you could see how much it meant to me as I crossed the line. I can’t believe I’ve finally done it. It means so much to me.

This aged well. Congrats@keelyhodgkinson- you took my advice and won ?????? ????????????https://t.co/lDbaSBwMrn

“And to do it here, where better? The audience was absolutely incredible, it felt like a home crowd to me. So I’m super happy.

“I feel like I’ve really grown over the last couple of years and this year is the year I’ve really tried to make that step up. The other girls are incredible. I knew to cross that line first I had to go one better than I ever had. I’m just so pleased to do it today. The future is bright.

“I’ve seen all the support from home, I’ve seen people messaging me and I haven’t got back to everyone yet but I will do and I’ve seen it all. It couldn’t feel more amazing to that have support. I’m super happy to bring it home for everyone. It’s not just me, it’s a whole team effort and they know who they are. This is our gold medal.”

title: Piers Morgan branded 'shameless' after claiming Olympic star won due to his advice | Celebrity News | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Alexandra Bullard
description: On Monday evening, middle-distance runner Keely Hodgkinson won gold at the 800m final in Paris for Team GB, which she described as her 'greatest race.'
